overall.description: First-person exploration through a futuristic cyberpunk city environment (Cyberpunk 2077), ascending stairs and walking through abandoned overgrown plazas with distinctive red smoke visible in the distance. The footage features high-quality game engine rendering with bright midday lighting and a warm color palette.

thick green vines covering building walls

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow stairwell with graffiti-covered walls, ascending into a sunlit abandoned plaza. The camera moves past a teal commercial building covered in overgrown vines, following an NPC ahead. An abandoned orange car sits in the plaza as the camera turns left to follow the building perimeter.

events.description: reaches top of stairs entering upper promenade level

agents.ego_description: following the NPC up a long flight of concrete stairs to the upper level

notable_agents.action: ascending stairs ahead of the camera

entered.detail: silver metal handrails along the staircase
thick red smoke rising into the sky in the distance

segments.scene_description: The camera follows the NPC up a long concrete staircase with metal railings. The red smoke plume becomes visible in the distance as they ascend. The surrounding area features concrete structures and sparse vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway beneath overpass with food stalls

events.description: moves under overpass into shadowed area
passes illuminated food stall with hanging meat

agents.ego_description: walking along the upper promenade under concrete overpasses, passing a food vendor stall

entered.detail: open-air food stall with teal counter and yellow interior lighting
concrete counter covered in blue and white graffiti tags

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath a concrete overpass structure, the camera moves through a sheltered walkway. A food stall with yellow lighting and graffiti-covered counters appears on the right. The red smoke plume remains visible to the left as the environment transitions from open to semi-covered.

scene_state.functional_zone: open wasteland with abandoned vehicle and distant futuristic skyline

events.description: exits covered walkway into open wasteland with dry grass
turns slightly right toward open plaza area

agents.ego_description: traversing the open wasteland area toward the distant futuristic cityscape

entered.detail: field of dry yellow grass and dirt
large abandoned military truck with missile launcher
tall futuristic skyscrapers with construction cranes
tall pole with linear LED light fixture

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges into a wide-open wasteland with dry grass fields, passing an abandoned military vehicle on the left. The futuristic city skyline with towering buildings and construction cranes dominates the horizon. The red smoke plume continues to rise in the distance as the camera moves toward the open plaza.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic urban stairwell into a vast, open wasteland overlooking a futuristic skyline. It begins by ascending a graffiti-covered stairwell into a sunlit plaza, passing a vine-covered teal building and an abandoned orange car. As the camera follows an NPC up a long concrete staircase, the environment opens up to reveal a distant plume of red smoke rising above the concrete structures. The scene then shifts beneath a sheltered concrete overpass, passing a yellow-lit food stall before emerging from the cover of the walkway. Finally, the camera moves through dry grass fields past an abandoned military vehicle, expanding into a wide-open plaza with towering skyscrapers and construction cranes dominating the horizon.
